nodes.context: Crime family of Cosa Nostra based in Caltagirone, Sicily, involved in extortion, drug trafficking, and political manipulation.
Mafia family based in Catania, Sicily, historically controlled Caltagirone area before the Caltagirone family's autonomy.
Powerful faction of Cosa Nostra led by Totò Riina, allied with the Caltagirone family.
Rival clan that attempted a coup against the Santapaola leadership in Catania, supported by Gesualdo La Rocca.
Criminal group from Lentini, maintains ties with the Caltagirone family.
Mafia family from Ramacca, listed as an ally of the Caltagirone family.

edges.context: The Caltagirone family was historically loyal to the Santapaola (Catania) clan and maintained alliances with them.
Francesco La Rocca allied with the Corleonesi led by Totò Riina to elevate the family's status.
Gesualdo La Rocca supported the Mazzei clan's attempted coup against the Santapaola, causing temporary strain.
The Caltagirone family maintains ties with the Nardo clan of Lentini.
The Ramacca family is listed as an ally of the Caltagirone family.
